cases.input: Before I touch this code, generate a knowledge graph of the codebase using graphify so I can check cross-file call relationships.
cases.notes: Canonical trigger: building the code graph before making changes.

cases.input: Can you build a code-graph for this repo with the graphify CLI before I start refactoring, so other skills can query call/import relationships across files?
cases.notes: Emphasizes downstream-skill querying, distinct phrasing from case 01.

cases.input: I want to profile CPU and memory usage while the application runs in production, to find performance bottlenecks.
cases.notes: Runtime performance profiling — exactly the case the skill's 'Do NOT use for runtime profiling' clause exists to redirect away from static code-graph generation.
